assumptions.yield_basis: modeled lbs/day per node at full deployment; zone factors from intensive-ag / agroforestry / aquaculture norms
assumptions.water_basis: gal/day per Maui County Bill 146 crop-water methodology (placeholder coefficients)
assumptions.note: PROJECTIONS, not actuals. Assumptions stated; refine with real crop data + HFEv4 T_ tables.

moon_window: 1.0 + 0.10*(1 - abs((moon-7)/7.0)) rounded half-even to 3, or 1.0 if moon falsy

game_rules._balance_note: 2026-07-02 winnability smoke fixes: (1) mauka_watershed_bonus 200->400; (2) Mauka plants EXEMPT from the water budget (upland forest catches rain, grows the shed) -- without this the game soft-locks needing water to plant the thing that makes water; (3) n54_gate universal_pono_min REMOVED -- the only Universal cards are the two jokers (N53 unplantable, N54 is the win card), so it was unsatisfiable. Gate = 4 pono per production zone (deck lock 18 Mauka / 18 Kula / 16 Makai + 2 jokers). (4) 2026-07-02 review: discards_per_moon=1 pressure valve — one free hand-discard per moon so a water-stuck hand can never freeze the deck (draw only fires when hand < 7).

_3d_note: zone_coef/price/gwt/moon_window/rounding are PARITY-LOCKED to sage_calc.py and the future AC_SGI_Calculator; game_rules are the 2D game layer and free to tune.

_data_conventions.governance_role: '—' = not yet chartered in the civic canon (node_map/node_map_canonical.json status 'UNDEFINED - no name match'). Only 4 roles are EVIDENCED_BY_NAME: N01 Wildfire Resilience Lead, N02+N04 Carbon & Ecology Lead, N42 Water Innovation Lead. Never invent civic titles; UE5 F_SGI_Node treats '—' as absent, same as the UI.
_data_conventions.card_identity: suit/rank/card_name = James canon from node_map_canonical (N01-N13 Hearts A-K, N14-N26 Diamonds, N27-N39 Clubs, N40-N52 Spades; one-of-each 52-card deck + 2 jokers).
